metadata.description: This individual appears to be a male in their 50s with deep, warm brown skin, showing some fine lines around the eyes and forehead. The face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is very short, closely cropped, and gray, with a slightly receding hairline. The eyes are almond-shaped and a striking hazel color, set wide apart, under medium-thick, slightly arched gray eyebrows. The nose is broad with a wide bridge and a rounded tip. The lips are medium-thick and well-defined, forming a gentle, closed-mouth smile. A short, neatly trimmed gray beard and mustache cover the chin and upper lip. The head is angled slightly to the left, with a direct, pleasant expression.
metadata.anchor: male with hazel eyes and gray beard
